title: Foes of AI Surveillance Get Wins in Wisconsin. But  They Fear They’re Playing Whack-A-Mole.
summary:
The sheriff in Wisconsin’s capital county will stop using dozens of AI surveillance cameras posted up across Madison and surrounding towns, after the Dane County Board of Supervisors pulled funding... Read More

title: Regency Silver: Alejandro Sucre Appointed To Board Of Directors
summary:
Regency Silver announced the appointment of Alejandro Sucre to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. The Canadian precious-metals exploration company is advancing the Dios Padre gold-copper-silver project in Sonora, Mexico, where it has reported a high-grade discovery interpreted as a magmatic-hydrothermal system that widens at depth.
The post Regency Silver: Alejandro Sucre Appointed To Board Of Directors appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Clearway Energy: Michael A. Brown Named General Counsel
summary:
Clearway Energy announced that Kevin P. Malcarney will retire from his role as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary effective June 1, 2026. Malcarney has served as General Counsel since May 2018, overseeing the company’s legal and compliance teams while supporting governance and strategic initiatives.
The post Clearway Energy: Michael A. Brown Named General Counsel appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Diversified Royalty: $235 Million Acquisition Of Mr. Lube + Tires Franchisor Business Announced
summary:
Diversified Royalty announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire the franchisor business of Mr. Lube + Tires for an aggregate purchase price of $235 million, subject to customary closing and post-closing adjustments. The acquisition is expected to close on or before the end of Q2 2026, pending regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions.
The post Diversified Royalty: $235 Million Acquisition Of Mr. Lube + Tires Franchisor Business Announced appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: WIRobotics: About $68 Million Series B Raised To Advance Humanoid Robotics And Physical AI
summary:
WIRobotics announced it has secured KRW 95 billion (approximately USD 68 million) in Series B funding as the company accelerates development of its humanoid robotics and Physical AI technologies. The financing comes about two years after the company’s KRW 13 billion Series A round in March 2024 and reflects increasing investor confidence in WIRobotics’ commercialization strategy and next-generation robotics platform.
The post WIRobotics: About $68 Million Series B Raised To Advance Humanoid Robotics And Physical AI appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Multiverse: $70 Million Raised At $2.1 Billion Valuation To Expand AI Upskilling Platform Across Europe
summary:
Multiverse announced it has raised $70 million in primary funding to accelerate its growth across Europe, reaching a $2.1 billion valuation. The investment round was led by Schroders Capital, with participation from existing investors including General Catalyst, Lightspeed Venture Partners, D1 Capital Partners, Index Ventures, Bond, and StepStone Group.
The post Multiverse: $70 Million Raised At $2.1 Billion Valuation To Expand AI Upskilling Platform Across Europe appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Wondrlab: $100 Million Investment Into Bridgesoul To Launch AI-Led Micro GCC Venture WondrBridge
summary:
Wondrlab announced an investment into Bridgesoul and the launch of WondrBridge, a new joint venture focused on building and operating AI-powered Nano and Micro Global Capability Centres (GCCs) for enterprises worldwide.
The post Wondrlab: $100 Million Investment Into Bridgesoul To Launch AI-Led Micro GCC Venture WondrBridge appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Hana Bank: $670 Million Stake Acquired In Crypto Exchange Operator Dunamu
summary:
Hana Bank, a subsidiary of Hana Financial Group, has agreed to acquire a 6.55% stake in Dunamu, the operator of South Korea’s largest cryptocurrency exchange, Upbit, in a deal valued at about $670 million, according to a Bloomberg report.
The post Hana Bank: $670 Million Stake Acquired In Crypto Exchange Operator Dunamu appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Data I/O: $23 Million Acquisition Deal To Nearly Double Revenue And Expand Service Business
summary:
Data I/O Corporation announced the execution of a letter of intent to acquire a semiconductor handling and packaging solutions manufacturer in a transaction valued at approximately $23 million, a move the company said is expected to nearly double annual revenue while expanding its higher-margin service offerings.
The post Data I/O: $23 Million Acquisition Deal To Nearly Double Revenue And Expand Service Business appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Stratos Onboards 11 Advisory Practices Representing $4.8 Billion In Total Client Assets
summary:
Stratos Wealth Holdings announced it has completed the acquisition of 11 partner advisory practices representing approximately $4.8 billion in total client assets as of December 31, 2025. The transactions were underway prior to SEI making a strategic investment in the business and reflect Stratos’ broader strategy of investing in advisory firms to support growth, enterprise value creation, and succession planning.
The post Stratos Onboards 11 Advisory Practices Representing $4.8 Billion In Total Client Assets appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Solvane Group: $50 Million Evolve Restoration Acquisition Creates National Property Restoration Platform
summary:
Solvane Group and David Carlson have completed a $50 million acquisition of the Evolve Restoration platform, forming a Dallas-headquartered national property restoration group focused on storm damage restoration, roofing, fire, smoke, water, and mold remediation services.
The post Solvane Group: $50 Million Evolve Restoration Acquisition Creates National Property Restoration Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Abbott, Stringham & Lynch: Acquisition Of ArightCo Expands Finance And Accounting Solutions Capabilities
summary:
Abbott, Stringham & Lynch (ASL), a full-service CPA firm based in Silicon Valley, announced it has acquired San Jose-based ArightCo, an integrated finance and accounting solutions provider serving mid-sized organizations. The acquisition is designed to expand ASL’s outsourced finance and accounting offerings for both current and future clients.
The post Abbott, Stringham & Lynch: Acquisition Of ArightCo Expands Finance And Accounting Solutions Capabilities appeared first on Pulse 2.0.
